mapper.select: SELECT tbca003.SNO AS sno, tbca003.LIST_NO AS listNo, tbca003.REC_NO AS recNo, tbca008.CUST_NAME AS custName, tbcb001.CAMP_NAME AS campName, tbca003.RECALL_TIME AS recallTime, tbca003.REC_TIME AS recTime, tbca001.LIST_LASTPHONE AS listLastphone, tbcb001.CAMP_SERVICE_DT AS campServiceDt FROM tbca003 JOIN tbca001 ON tbca003.LIST_NO = tbca001.LIST_NO JOIN tbca008 ON tbca001.CUST_NO = tbca008.CUST_NO JOIN tbcb001 ON tbca003.LIST_CAMPCODE = tbcb001.CAMP_CODE WHERE tbca003.RECALL_TIME BETWEEN TIMESTAMP(#{request.startDate}, #{request.startTime}) AND TIMESTAMP(#{request.endDate}, #{request.endTime}) AND tbca003.REC_TIME IS NULL ORDER BY tbca003.RECALL_TIME
